final:
module fan_speed_control (
    input clk,
    input [7:0] temperature,
    output reg [1:0] fan_speed
);
    
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (temperature <= 20) 
            fan_speed <= 2'b00; // Low speed
        else if (temperature <= 25) 
            fan_speed <= 2'b01; // Medium speed
        else 
            fan_speed <= 2'b10; // High speed
    end
    
endmodule
